'''Boma Inondo''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]], who attempted to capture [[Momaw Nadon/Legends|Momaw Nadon]] on the ''[[Tafanda Bay]]'' in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. He failed, and was subsequently killed.
